reviews.review_description:
i don't know if this is a good game or not but if anyone has a review is there how to get the gloves please tell me this might become a good game or not but i don't know so if anyone knows with gloves are or how to get them please tell me 
5 stars

My whole family got mad becouse i played this game now i am begingthe owner for a refund 
Because even if the game gave me 10€ I would not play this sh*t and now my as is beging for a home not a homeless place like this game nigaboi
It is not letting me interact and I can’t play the game because its not showing the gloves and I didn’t play the game

I was exited to play but were are the hands or gloves,if someone knows,
help
There are no gloves, and to start the game YOU NEED THE GLOVES !!! Don't download it because it's a waste of time
I couldnt play the game its trash
i am angry of this game

The game was ok it was the only free boxing game I could find and it's a free game don't expect much so I don't know why people are all like oh the game is so horrible all this stupid crap I mean it's a free game it's not gonna be extremely realistic top notch you know but it sucks that the owner isnt gonna update it anymore and I saw his tiktok on it. the game was filled with a lot of glitches but I feel like the game did have potential to become good one day so that's why I don't like that the owner is gonna update it anymore cause he could have made this game one of the best free boxing games but hopefully the owner of this game comes out with games in the future, and if you don't have  any money to spend on a boxing game this game, I definitely recommend and it even has multiplayer, which is a super cool feature for a free game. Anyways.try out just game, you might think it's bad, but I thought it was pretty decent for a free game. Yeah, that's my reading and have a great day/night bye.
trash ah game it probably took 10 mins to do bruh
this game ruined my life! my wife left me because i installed this!! 100% recommend. she was a meanie head

The game is filled with GLITCHES 

Almost All the reviews are lies. This game has no damage system. It's very unrealistic 

Also our heads looks like chopped off Joe biden

developer_response.body: Sorry you feel this way! Please come back on the 8-9th of December when the new update is out and see how you think then. Thank you for your review.

reviews.review_description:
I almost returned the VR because of this game.
So many glitches, poor quality of visuals, collisions are poorly managed.

THIS GAME IS THE WORST BOXING GAME I HAVE EVER SEEN!!! ALL OF THE GOOD REVIEWS ABOUT THIS GAME ARE LIES!!! I WANT TO BOX BUT I CANT BECAUSE OF THIS TRASH BOXING GAME!!! THERE IS NOBODY THAT PLAYS THIS GAME AT ALL!!! I WENT TO ALL OF THE LOBBIES BUT NOT A SINGLE SOUL WAS IN THE LOBBIES!!!

developer_response.body: I am sorry you don't enjoy the game, come back and retry in a few days when a new update comes out! The game will be much better and active. I am very sorry.

reviews.review_description: Pay the $10 for Thrill of the Fight 2

developer_response.body: I'm sorry that you don't like this game, There will be future updates to make the game much better as its in development still!

reviews.review_description: Has the potensial to be one of the best boxing games brilliant and active developer who work hard
For a game still in beta the owner is very active and so is the mod team and the game is improving day by day.
Right now its bit buggy, but in the future it will be great 💪
Doesn't work properly

developer_response.body: I am sorry about this experience you had! At that time the game was infact down and not working. I do request you Retrying it and seeing how it is now!

reviews.review_description: This game has great potential and will be one of the best free game in the future if u haven’t played it already please try it as more users will mean more updates that help the game become great
Game is good but the bugs make it worst, the bugs have been getting fixed little by little.
